purpose: Provide compact generation context so a model can turn the Glen-facing Design IR into an engineering-review TaPaaS config schema candidate while preserving page, section and block structure.

sourceInputs.role: Primary Design IR input for Glen review
Human-readable map of selected page/frame/instance candidates
Selected node metadata and review warnings
Engineering-review pseudo-schema candidate, not confirmed TaPaaS schema

knownGlenFeedback.firstRunIssue: Sections were not created in the first run even though sections existed in the JSON.
knownGlenFeedback.likelyGap: Generation context and prompting, not Figma extraction quality.

structuralRules: Treat the input JSON as Design IR, not final TaPaaS schema.
Generate a TaPaaS config schema candidate according to Glen's known specification.
Preserve page order from the input.
Do not invent backend mapping, validation contracts, routing or persistence behaviour.
hierarchyRules: Do not flatten blocks directly under a page when sections exist.
Every page must contain sections unless explicitly marked shell-only.
Every section must contain blocks or an explicit Unknown placeholder.
If the target schema uses different names for page, section or block, map to Glen's names while preserving the same hierarchy.
shellHandlingRules: Treat shell/global content as inherited or excluded unless Glen's schema requires otherwise.
Do not treat header, footer, nav, search, account or global government/service chrome as transaction field evidence.
Record shell/global handling decisions in the gap report when uncertain.
ctaRules: Keep CTAs separate from content blocks.
Do not convert CTA labels into field labels.
Preserve CTA labels such as Continue, Back, Submit and Exit when present.
Mark CTA targets or navigation behaviour as Unknown unless confirmed by Glen's schema or explicit evidence.
validationRules: Keep validation and error evidence separate from normal field/content evidence.
Do not mix validation text into normal labels, headings or content blocks.
Mark validation model, error focus behaviour and backend-owned error taxonomy as Unknown unless confirmed by Glen's schema or engineering evidence.
unknownHandlingRules: Mark unknown schema concepts as Unknown rather than inventing exact TaPaaS fields.
Preserve the Review INSTANCE caveat: the Review page candidate is an INSTANCE, not a clean child FRAME, and requires Glen/Michael confirmation.
Preserve privacy and legal content as requiring owner confirmation.
Do not claim accessibility, privacy/legal, GEL or TaPaaS approval.
acceptanceChecks: All selected input candidates appear in the config.
Page -> section -> block hierarchy is preserved.
No page with sections has blocks flattened directly under the page.
Each page has at least one section unless explicitly shell-only.
Each section has at least one block or explicit Unknown placeholder.
CTAs are represented separately from content blocks.
Validation evidence is not mixed into normal field labels.
Shell/global content is excluded or marked inherited.
Privacy and legal content remains marked as requiring owner confirmation.
Unknowns remain unknown rather than invented.
Output does not claim production readiness or TaPaaS approval.
outputCaveats: No privacy or legal approval claim.
